title: Pleurothallis maculiglossa
taxonomy: Pleurothallis maculiglossa belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly referred to as the orchid family. It is a genus of orchids native to the Americas. This species is a type of epiphytic orchid, which means it grows on other plants, typically trees, without causing harm. The classification of Pleurothallis maculiglossa is further categorized under the subfamily Epidendroideae and tribe Cranichideae. This classification helps to identify and understand the unique characteristics of the species within its broader taxonomic group.

This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation and respiratory problems, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
